Bash(printf 'pre-compute index URLs in filter-index.json\\n\\nBuild index URLs server-side in lib/filter-index.js \(using the same\\nlib/slug.js as the templates\) and embed them in filter-index.json as\\n`indexUrls`. search.js reads them directly, removing the need for a\\nclient-side slugify duplicate.\\n\\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>' > /tmp/commit-msg.txt && git add src/assets/search.js src/assets/style.css lib/filter-config.js lib/filter-index.js && git commit -F /tmp/commit-msg.txt)
